arts.ttl: “It’s an interesting one” – Worldwide rap superstar could be part of sensational Everton takeover
arts.sum: The 2024/25 Premier League season hasn’t provided much respite from the madness that appears to be going on behind the scenes at Everton Football Club. Four defeats from their opening four games has done nothing in terms of supporter confidence that their club will still be in the English top-flight in a year’s time, when […] The post “It’s an interesting one” – Worldwide rap superstar could be part of sensational Everton takeover appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can you remember the Arsenal team from their shock 2-1 defeat by Everton in December 2021?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche stance shouldn't change but Everton must learn quickly against Leicester
arts.sum: In this week's Royal Blue column, Chris Beesley highlights the importance of supporter opinion for Sean Dyche and Kevin Thelwell ahead of Everton's trip to Leicester City

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche explains why he won't rush Jarrad Branthwaite back for Everton
arts.sum: Everton manager Sean Dyche has been explained his cautious approach regarding Jarrad Branthwaite's return from injury

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper's antagonistic stance may help Leicester City restore points deduction injustice - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Plus, Cooper, having not been the man to lift City into the Premier League, knows he’s got a long way to go to earn the love of the supporters, and it’s probably true for a fair few players too. While it’s ultimately brilliant news for the club’s survival hopes that one possible source of a points deduction has been blocked, it also meant, for a brief while, that City were no longer in opposition to the Premier League.
